intro: Between 14 and 27 April 2026, ZCyberNews published 11 articles under the botnet tag. Threat actors Dort, Mirai, and The Gentlemen were observed. Key vulnerabilities included CVE-2025-29635 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2024-3721 (CVSS 6.3), and CVE-2023-33538. Affected sectors spanned technology, telecommunications, corporate, finance, and internet infrastructure, with reported impacts in Canada, the Czech Republic, Germany, the United States, and globally. The coverage comprised eight high-severity incidents, two medium, and one critical.
